_metadata.name: L1 - Attack Surface Reduction Rules (Audit Mode)
_metadata.cisMapping: Endpoint Detection, Antivirus & ASR: ASR rules, deployed in Audit mode first
_metadata.rollback: Delete/disable profile; ASR rules stop evaluating immediately, no reboot needed.
_metadata.impactNote: Audit mode logs what WOULD be blocked without actually blocking anything — this is the safe first step. Review Defender for Endpoint 'Attack surface reduction rules' report for 2-4 weeks before promoting any rule to Block mode (see Policies/L2/ASR-BlockMode.json) to confirm no legitimate business workflow trips a rule.

name: ZeroTrust-L1-ASR-AuditMode
description: Core Attack Surface Reduction rules in Audit mode: blocks credential theft from LSASS, Office child process creation, obfuscated scripts, and executable content from email/webmail — logged only, not enforced, until validated per-persona.
